method: reset from Coverage Summary CI on PR #609 after upgrading @vitest/coverage-v8 from 3.x to 4.x; Vitest 4 changed V8 coverage accounting for existing TypeScript files while patch coverage stayed clean
note: This baseline is the contract the coverage gate in .github/workflows/coverage.yml enforces on every PR. Update it in the same PR as any deliberate regression or coverage tool accounting reset and explain why in the PR description. See .coverage-gate.toml for thresholds and docs/COVERAGE.md#for-ai-coding-agents for the remediation loop.
